zh.Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾分尼 本特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cicely Ellen Beresford於1461年出生在英國德比夏爾分尼 本特利時，她的父親Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley41歲，母親Lady Agnes Hassall39歲。她於大約1499年與Thomas Chetwode在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年在英國英格蘭享年59歲。

zh-hans.Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾分尼 本特利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cicely Ellen Beresford于1461年出生在英国德比夏爾分尼 本特利时，她的父亲Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley41岁，母亲Lady Agnes Hassall39岁。她于大约1499年与Thomas Chetwode在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年在英国英格兰享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beresford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in the parish of Alstonfield, Staffordshire named Beresford, from Old English beofor ‘beaver’ (or possibly from a byname from this word) + Old English ford ‘ford’. This name also became established in Ireland.

History: The first recorded bearer of the surname is John de Beveresford, who held the manor of Beresford, Staffordshire, from c. 1220 to 1241. All present-day Beresfords are apparently descended from Thomas Beresford, who fought at Agincourt in 1415 and who fathered sixteen sons and five daughters. The Irish branch of the family includes the Marquesses of Waterford.

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Cicely Ellen Beresford was born in 1461, in Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley, was 41 and her mother, Lady Agnes Hassall, was 39. She married Thomas Chetwode about 1499, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1520, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cicely Ellen Beresford est née en 1461, à Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Hassall, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Chetwode environ 1499, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1520, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cicely Ellen Beresford 1461 in Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley 41 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes Hassall 39. Sie hat um 1499 in Staffordshire, England Thomas Chetwode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 59 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Ellen Beresford è nata il nel 1461 nel Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes Hassall, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Chetwode circa 1499, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1520, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Ellen Beresfordが1461年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアフエニー ベントリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentleyは41歳，母Lady Agnes Hassallは39歳であった。約1499年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでThomas Chetwodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年にイギリスイギリスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Ellen Beresford(이)가 1461년 영국 더비실르 펜이 벤틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes Hassall(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1499년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Thomas Chetwode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Ellen Beresford nasceu em 1461, em Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Hassall, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Chetwode aproximadamente 1499, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1520, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cicely Ellen Beresford родилась в 1461 г. в местности фенни бентли, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Hassall, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Chetwode около 1499 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1520 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cicely Ellen Beresford nació en 1461, en Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Hassall, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Thomas Chetwode aproximadamente 1499, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1520, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
